headline: Does ADI’s New US$3 Billion Credit Line and AI Power Deal Reshape Its Growth Narrative?
summary: Earlier this month, Analog Devices entered into a new 364-day revolving credit agreement providing up to US$3.00 billion in multicurrency borrowing capacity, with flexible repayment, extension, and term-loan conversion options tied to its debt ratings and customary financial covenants. This expanded liquidity, alongside the planned Empower Semiconductor acquisition for AI power technologies, underpins Analog Devices’ ability to fund growth across Industrial and AI data center markets while...
